title: Swap Adjacent In LR String
hints: Remove all 'X' characters from both strings and check if the resulting sequences of 'L' and 'R' are identical.
Verify that every 'L' in start is at an index greater than or equal to its matching 'L' in end.
Ensure every 'R' in start is at an index less than or equal to its matching 'R' in end.
